name: wilson-guards
description: Three dancinlab-workflow PreToolUse guards in one bundle, standalone ports of wilson's governance + guard-* predicates: ssot-lock (deny editing a file matched by an ssot-lock: bullet in the nearest AGENTS.md ## Governance), tape-append-only (a .tape trace is append-only — deny a rewriting Edit or an overwriting Write), domain-lint (a root UPPERCASE.md topic roadmap must be Head + --- + ## Log). Each guard is inert unless its convention is present. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GUARDS=1.
